message:
Command `# EXCELLENT DISCOVERY! 
# FD 12 is writing to antenna.rpt (opened at 01:38, still open)
# FD 9 is writing to openroad-globalrouting.log (opened at 01:10, still open)
# FD 12 was opened at 01:38 - so antenna check is still running!
# The OpenROAD binary must be running as a subprocess that we can't see with pstree.
# Let's look for openroad processes
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# EXCELLENT DISCOVERY! 
# FD 12 is writing to antenna.rpt (opened at 01:38, still open)
# FD 9 is writing to openroad-globalrouting.log (opened at 01:10, still open)
# FD 12 was opened at 01:38 - so antenna check is still running!
# The OpenROAD binary must be running as a subprocess that we can't see with pstree.
# Let's look for openroad processes
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | head -5"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# EXCELLENT DISCOVERY! 
# FD 12 is writing to antenna.rpt (opened at 01:38, still open)
# FD 9 is writing to openroad-globalrouting.log (opened at 01:10, still open)
# FD 12 was opened at 01:38 - so antenna check is still running!
# The OpenROAD binary must be running as a subprocess that we can't see with pstree.
# Let's look for openroad processes
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | head -5
